# Soft44 Micro44 Min6 Contract

## Soft 44
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.44 with quality bias floor 0.42 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Micro 44
micro minContextUsageRatio defaults to 0.44 so tool-result clearing starts earlier

## Min 6
micro minContentTokens defaults to 6 so smaller bulky tool results clear sooner

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status vitest
